title: Task execution graph card with real-time updates
purpose: Displays task execution graphs with loading, error, and empty states. Supports real-time updates via WebSocket and includes optional close functionality.
module_context: Exports a React functional component TaskGraphCard that accepts project and session props, uses a custom hook for task graph data, and renders different UI states based on loading, error, or diagram availability.

steps.content: Retrieve task graph data and loading/error states from the useTaskGraph hook.
IF loading state is active, render a centered spinner with loading message.
ELSE IF an error occurred, display an error alert with the error message.
ELSE IF no diagram is available, show a message indicating no tasks.
ELSE render the task diagram within a card layout with optional close button.
